summary: The host-clock hook is correctly feature-gated, remains off the untraced path, uses saturating elapsed-time subtraction, preserves the native Instant fallback, and is installed by the real wasm ANALYZE export before execution. The engine unit test verifies routing through the hook, while the wasm-boundary test verifies a populated nonzero root timing. Public API and both Rust/wasm usage documentation are updated consistently. No correctness, soundness, security, or vacuous-test defect requiring changes was found.
